Biography

øLu AnuAkin is a multidisciplinary artist, griot, and founder from Minnesota, rooted in Yoruba and North American heritage. Working across music, visual art, and cinematic world-building, he crafts emotionally layered work that bridges Alternative Soul, Indie R&B, and conscious hip-hop.

His debut single PWR marks a statement of personal transformation — stepping into power, resilience, and arrival. The forthcoming Afterglow EP expands the sonic palette into cinematic, introspective territory.

As founder of Galorious Expression®, øLu approaches artistry as an integrated practice — sound, image, and story are inseparable. Every project is a world.

Scene Catalog
WTFYA
Arrival  ·  Confidence  ·  Breakthrough
Confident arrival energy. A character stepping into the room and owning it. Opening scene, personal montage, the moment someone decides who they are.
PWR
Transformation  ·  Resilience  ·  Power
Personal transformation. The moment everything shifts. Stepping into power — a character becoming who they were always meant to be.
INDECISION
Uncertainty  ·  Urban Slow-Burn  ·  Tension
Emotionally direct, still unresolved. A character at a crossroads. City quiet, 2am. The kind of tension that has no clean answer.
ALWYS LØVE(D)
Reflection  ·  Stillness  ·  Longing
Reflective and still. End of something — a character alone with their thoughts. Warm light fading. A love that never quite finished.
